messages.subtitle: Advanced custom captions with HTML and dynamic placeholders.
messages.message: Use advanced custom captions with HTML and dynamic placeholders, including integrations with ACF and Pods.

settings.label: Caption Visibility
settings.description: Choose when the caption is shown. Some hover effects manage caption visibility themselves and override this setting.

settings.label: Horizontal
settings.description: Change the horizontal alignment of the thumbnail captions.

settings.label: Vertical
settings.description: Change the vertical alignment of the caption inside the overlay.

settings.label: Limit Title Length
settings.description: Limit the length of the title in thumbnails. This will NOT limit the length of captions from within the lightbox.

settings.label: Max Title Characters
settings.description: Maximum number of characters to display in the title.

settings.label: Max Title Lines
settings.description: A max number of lines of text to display. A value of zero will not apply a limit.

settings.label: Limit Description Length
settings.description:
Limit the length of the description in thumbnails.
This will NOT limit the length of captions from within the lightbox.

settings.label: Max Description Characters
settings.description: Maximum number of characters to display in the description.

settings.label: Max Description Lines
settings.description: A max number of lines of text to display. A value of zero will not apply a limit.
